title: fumaria officinalis var. scandens
intro: Fumaria officinalis var. scandens, also known as climbing fumitory or creeping fumitory, is a type of flowering plant in the fumitory family. It is a perennial or annual herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. Fumaria officinalis var. scandens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
